Results for 'top attractions, sights and restaurants in Bruges Belgium' in Bruges, Belgium:
1. Pigeon House [Belgian restaurant] ⭐ 4.5 (987 reviews) | €30–70
   🕐 Open · Closes 9 PM
   📍 Sint-Jansplein 12
   "Definitely stop here for dinner on your visit to Bruges."
2. Viewpoint Passage Bourgondisch Cruyce [Scenic spot] ⭐ 4.8 (84 reviews)
   🕐 Open 24 hours
   📍 Bruges, Belgium
   "One of the best view points in Bruges."
3. Rosary Quay [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.8 (2900 reviews)
   🕐 Open 24 hours
   📍 Rozenhoedkaai 3
   "Seriously, a total postcard moment and a must-see in Bruges!"
4. Historic centre of Brugge (Bruges) [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.8 (547 reviews)
   🕐 Open 24 hours
   📍 Grote Markt
   "Dominating the view is the 83-meter-high Belfry of Bruges."
5. De Burg [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.7 (4400 reviews)
   🕐 Open 24 hours
   📍 Burg 15
   "Both are definitely a must-see sight in Bruges!"
